name: accessible-output
description: Shape Claude Code and Codex output for ADHD and autistic readers: lead with the next action, make context explicit, reduce ambiguity, and keep progress visible.

interface.longDescription: Make Claude Code and Codex responses easier to act on with direct answers, explicit assumptions, predictable structure, visible progress, and fewer tangents.
defaultPrompt: Use accessible-output to make every response action-first and easy to scan.
